channel.title: My Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My Hugo Site

item.description:
title: “CI/CD Demo” date: 2026-03-24 draft: false

Welcome! 👋

This is a demo project showcasing a simple CI/CD pipeline using Hugo and Netlify. The site is automatically built and deployed whenever changes are pushed to the repository.

The goal of this project is to demonstrate how continuous integration and deployment can streamline development and make updates fast, reliable, and efficient.
